login-texts.please-login:
Please Sign In 
to access this page.

errors.default-popup-error-text:
An unexpected error occurred. 
Please try again later.
errors.AccessDenied: You do not have access to this account. The account may be restricted or not yet activated.
errors.Configuration:
A technical error occurred. 
Please try again later.
errors.RegistrationFailed: We couldn’t complete your registration. Please try again.
errors.ProfileUpdateFailed: We couldn’t save your profile changes. Please try again.
errors.PasswordUpdateFailed: We couldn’t save your password changes. Please try again.
errors.RegisterValidationError:
Not all required fields 
were filled in correctly. 
Please check the form 
and try again.
errors.ConsentsRequired:
To create an account, you must accept the terms of service 
and the privacy policy.
errors.UserAlreadyExists:
An account with this email 
already exists. Please sign in 
or reset your password.
errors.TooManyLoginAttempts:
Too many login attempts. 
Access has been temporarily 
blocked. Please try again later.
errors.name-invalid: Name must contain at least 2 letters and no numbers
errors.password-minLength: Password must be at least 6 characters long
errors.password-no-cyrillic: Password must not contain Cyrillic characters
errors.password-uppercase: Password must contain an uppercase letter
errors.password-lowercase: Password must contain a lowercase letter
errors.privacy-required: You must agree to the privacy policy
errors.terms-required: You must accept the terms of service
errors.Unauthorized: Your session has expired or access is denied. Please sign in again.
errors.OnboardingValidationError:
Please complete all required fields 
and confirm the consents.
errors.UserNotFound:
The user was not found or access 
to the account is restricted.

popups.signup-subtitle: Create an account to save your learning progress
popups.reset-password-subtitle: Enter the email address associated with your account and we’ll send you instructions to reset your password
popups.delete-accaunt-popup-text: After deleting your account, you will still be able to restore it for 14 days. After this period, all profile data will be permanently deleted. Do you want to continue?

onboarding.title: Welcome
onboarding.subtitle:
Choose the language you want to learn in. 
We’ll show translations in this language.

download-app.title: Install the App
download-app.subtitle: Add WortKraft to your home screen and get quick access to your training anytime.
download-app.do-not-show-again: Do not show this message again

not-found-page.title: Page not found
not-found-page.subtitle:
The page may have been moved or deleted. 
Check the path and try again.

server-error-page.title: Something went wrong
server-error-page.subtitle:
A server error occurred. 
Please try again a little later.

profile.profile-updated-text: Your profile information has been updated successfully.
profile.password-updated-text: Your password has been updated successfully. Make sure to keep it in a safe place. If you forget it, you can reset it later.
